languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

languages.text: "Не поймите неправильно, Лорд-капитан, но я не люблю появляться в этом месте. Барахлящие импланты и без того приводят меня сюда слишком часто".
languages.translation_comment: characters entered the medbay for the first time

languages.text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."
languages.original_text: "Не поймите неправильно, Лорд-капитан, но я не люблю появляться в этом месте. Барахлящие импланты и без того приводят меня сюда слишком часто".

traits.locale_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."
"Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."
"Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

languages.text: 「誤解しないでください、艦長様。私はこの場所にいることを好まないのです。私の故障したインプラントが原因で、私はここによく来ているのです」
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: 「誤解しないでください、艦長様。私はこの場所にいることを好まないのです。私の故障したインプラントが原因で、私はここによく来ているのです。」

languages.text: « Ne vous méprenez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, mais cet endroit ne me plaît guère. Mes implants défaillants me font déjà venir ici bien trop souvent à mon goût. »
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: « Ne vous méprenez pas, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, mais cet endroit ne me plaît guère. Mes implants défaillants me font déjà venir ici bien trop souvent à mon goût. »

languages.text: "Versteht mich nicht falsch, Lord Captain, aber ich mag diesen Ort nicht. Ich bin aufgrund meiner defekten Implantate zu oft hier."
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: "Versteht mich nicht falsch, Lord Captain, aber ich mag diesen Ort nicht. Ich bin aufgrund meiner defekten Implantate zu oft hier."

languages.text: "Yanlış anlamayın Lord Kaptan ama bu yerde bulunmaktan hoşlanmıyorum. Arızalı implantlarım zaten gereğinden fazla sık burada bulunmama neden oluyor."
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: "Yanlış anlamayın Lord Kaptan ama bu yerde bulunmaktan hoşlanmıyorum. Arızalı implantlarım zaten gereğinden fazla sık burada bulunmama neden oluyor."

languages.text: «No me entienda mal, Lord Capitán, pero no me gusta este sitio. Bastante tiempo paso ya aquí cuando mis implantes se averían».
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: «No me entienda mal, Lord Capitán, pero no me gusta este sitio. Bastante tiempo paso ya aquí cuando mis implantes se averían».

languages.text: “请别误会，舰长大人，但我实在不喜欢待在这地方。光是我这些故障百出的植入物，就害得我频繁造访这里了。”
languages.original_text: "Do not mistake me, Lord Captain, but I dislike being in this place. My malfunctioning implants cause me to be here too often as it is."

traits.locale_text: “请别误会，舰长大人，但我实在不喜欢待在这地方。光是我这些故障百出的植入物，就害得我频繁造访这里了。”
